LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RICHARD HOEFER'S MOTION TO VACATE TERMINATING SANCTIONS. DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-FILED. NOTWITHSTANDING LOCAL RULE 2.6B, JIN IM'S LETTER OF AUGUST 13 MENTIONING THAT THE COURT DID NOT HAVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND A CALL MADE BY THE COURT TO MOVING PARTY'S COUNSEL ON AUGUST 23 REQUESTING COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS, THE COURT HAS STILL NOT RECEIVED COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES.
RULING: THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF RICHARD HOEFER'S Motion To Vacate Terminating Sanctions. Denied without prejudice to being re-filed. NotwithstandIng Local rule 2.6B, Jin Im's letter of August 13 mentioning that the court did not have courtesy copies of the moving papers and a call made by the court to moving party's counsel on August 23 requesting courtesy copies of the moving papers, the court has still not received courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.

ATTY. PHAIDRA M. GARCIA, TEL. NO. (925) 210-1300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT MI-KYUNG HONG'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff IS GRANTED. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =(302/HEK)
